atomic_units.action: Follow up with the employee to confirm that all system accesses are working correctly.
Raise a follow-up IT ticket with the IT Helpdesk and mark it as high priority.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee reports any access issues

atomic_units.action: Escalate the unresolved access issue to the IT Manager.
atomic_units.condition: If the access issue is not resolved within 1 business day
